    SELECT "p1"."ProjectId", "p1"."UserId", "p1"."Role", "a0"."Id", "a0"."AvatarUrl", "a0"."Company", "a0"."Country", "a0"."CreatedAt", "a0"."Email", "a0"."FirstName", "a0"."FullName", "a0"."LastLoginAt", "a0"."LastName", "a0"."PasswordHash", "a0"."Phone", "a0"."ResetToken", "a0"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a0"."Timezone"
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p1"
    INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a0" ON "p1"."UserId" = "a0"."Id"
) AS "s" ON "p"."Id" = "s"."ProjectId"
WHERE "p"."OwnerId" = @userId OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p0"
    WHERE "p"."Id" = "p0"."ProjectId" AND "p0"."UserId" = @userId)
ORDER BY "p"."CreatedAt" DESC, "p"."Id", "a"."Id", "s"."ProjectId", "s"."UserId"

INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "t"."OwnerId" = "a"."Id"
LEFT JOIN "TeamMembers" AS "t1" ON "t"."Id" = "t1"."TeamId"
WHERE "t"."OwnerId" = @userId OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "TeamMembers" AS "t0"
    WHERE "t"."Id" = "t0"."TeamId" AND "t0"."UserId" = @userId)
ORDER BY "t"."Id", "a"."Id", "t1"."TeamId"

2026-04-14 00:22:17.678 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (0ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT "t"."Id", "t"."CreatedAt", "t"."Description", "t"."Name", "t"."OwnerId", "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone", "t1"."TeamId", "t1"."UserId", "t1"."Role"
FROM "Teams" AS "t"
INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "t"."OwnerId" = "a"."Id"
LEFT JOIN "TeamMembers" AS "t1" ON "t"."Id" = "t1"."TeamId"
WHERE "t"."OwnerId" = @userId OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "TeamMembers" AS "t0"

SELECT "t"."Id", "t"."CreatedAt", "t"."Description", "t"."Name", "t"."OwnerId", "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone", "t1"."TeamId", "t1"."UserId", "t1"."Role"
FROM "Teams" AS "t"
INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "t"."OwnerId" = "a"."Id"
LEFT JOIN "TeamMembers" AS "t1" ON "t"."Id" = "t1"."TeamId"
WHERE "t"."OwnerId" = @userId OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "TeamMembers" AS "t0"
    WHERE "t"."Id" = "t0"."TeamId" AND "t0"."UserId" = @userId)
ORDER BY "t"."Id", "a"."Id", "t1"."TeamId"
2026-04-14 15:22:31.658 +02:00 [INF] Executing endpoint '/hubs/notifications/negotiate'
2026-04-14 15:22:31.658 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (0ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone"
FROM "AppUsers" AS "a"
WHERE "a"."Id" IN (
    SELECT "m"."ReceiverId"
    FROM "Messages" AS "m"
    WHERE "m"."SenderId" = @userId
    UNION
    SELECT "m0"."SenderId" AS "ReceiverId"
    FROM "Messages" AS "m0"

2026-04-14 15:25:14.111 +02:00 [INF] CORS policy execution successful.
2026-04-14 15:25:14.111 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (0ms) [Parameters=[@userId='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone"
FROM "AppUsers" AS "a"
WHERE "a"."Id" IN (
    SELECT "m"."ReceiverId"
    FROM "Messages" AS "m"
    WHERE "m"."SenderId" = @userId
    UNION

    SELECT "p1"."ProjectId", "p1"."UserId", "p1"."Role", "a0"."Id", "a0"."AvatarUrl", "a0"."Company", "a0"."Country", "a0"."CreatedAt", "a0"."Email", "a0"."FirstName", "a0"."FullName", "a0"."LastLoginAt", "a0"."LastName", "a0"."PasswordHash", "a0"."Phone", "a0"."ResetToken", "a0"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a0"."Timezone"
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p1"
    INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a0" ON "p1"."UserId" = "a0"."Id"
) AS "s" ON "p"."Id" = "s"."ProjectId"
WHERE "p"."OwnerId" = @userId OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "ProjectMembers" AS "p0"
    WHERE "p"."Id" = "p0"."ProjectId" AND "p0"."UserId" = @userId)
ORDER BY "p"."CreatedAt" DESC, "p"."Id", "a"."Id", "s"."ProjectId", "s"."UserId"

INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "r"."UserId" = "a"."Id"
WHERE NOT ("r"."HasFired") AND "r"."FireAt" <= @upTo
ORDER BY "r"."FireAt"

2026-04-14 20:01:48.116 +02:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (1ms) [Parameters=[@upTo='?' (Size = 28)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT "r"."Id", "r"."CreatedAt", "r"."FireAt", "r"."FiredAt", "r"."HasFired", "r"."NotifyEmail", "r"."NotifyInApp", "r"."TaskId", "r"."UserId", "t"."Id", "t"."AssigneeId", "t"."CreatedAt", "t"."Description", "t"."DueDate", "t"."IsStarred", "t"."Priority", "t"."ProjectId", "t"."Status", "t"."Title", "a"."Id", "a"."AvatarUrl", "a"."Company", "a"."Country", "a"."CreatedAt", "a"."Email", "a"."FirstName", "a"."FullName", "a"."LastLoginAt", "a"."LastName", "a"."PasswordHash", "a"."Phone", "a"."ResetToken", "a"."ResetTokenExpiry", "a"."Timezone"
FROM "Reminders" AS "r"
INNER JOIN "TaskItems" AS "t" ON "r"."TaskId" = "t"."Id"
INNER JOIN "AppUsers" AS "a" ON "r"."UserId" = "a"."Id"
